title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MINALIN, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3349 / 57 OG No. 7, 1199 (February 13, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2811, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MINALIN, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Dawe and Maniañgo in the Municipality of Minalin, Province of Pampanga, are converted into barrios of said municipality to be known as the barrios of Dawe and Maniañgo, respectively.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
